<!--
  Trade Proposal Template
  Fill in the YAML block below AND write your investment thesis in markdown.
  Both sections are required for AI evaluation.
-->

```yaml
ticker: ""          # e.g. AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL — for crypto use slash format: BTC/USD, ETH/USD
action: ""          # BUY or SELL
asset_class: ""     # STOCK or CRYPTO (defaults to STOCK if blank)
```

## Investment Thesis

<!-- Why should the portfolio make this trade? Be specific and data-driven. -->



## Fundamental Analysis

<!-- Earnings, revenue, competitive position, catalysts, etc. -->



## Technical Analysis (optional)

<!-- Price levels, moving averages, volume patterns, RSI, etc. -->



## Risk Factors

<!-- What could go wrong? Every good pitch acknowledges downside. -->



## Time Horizon & Confidence

- **Time Horizon:** <!-- Short-term (1-3 mo) / Medium-term (3-12 mo) / Long-term (1+ yr) -->
- **Confidence:** <!-- High / Medium / Low -->

---

### Checklist

- [ ] I have reviewed the [banned tickers list](config/banned_tickers.txt)
- [ ] I understand this is **live trading with real capital**
- [ ] My pitch is at least 200 characters with substantive analysis
- [ ] I have acknowledged risk factors
